Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.swing.AbstractAsiContainerPanel

Packages that use AbstractAsiContainerPanel
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.swing
Provides the foundational Swing UI components for managing and switching between multiple AI agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.internal
Internal Swing utilities and bridge components for Anahata ASI.

  • Uses of AbstractAsiContainerPanel in uno.anahata.asi.swing

    Subclasses of AbstractAsiContainerPanel in uno.anahata.asi.swing
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AsiCardsContainerPanel
    A container panel that displays active AI agi sessions as a collection of "sticky note" cards.
    class 
    AsiTableContainerPanel
    A container panel that displays active AI agi sessions in a tabular format.

    Description

    Constructs a new preferences Command Center, defaulting to the first tab.

    Constructs a new preferences Command Center with a specific tab selected.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    SwingTask(AbstractAsiContainerPanel containerPanel, String taskName, Callable<T> backgroundTask)
    Constructs a SwingTask bound to the global Container dashboard with default settings.
     
    SwingTask(AbstractAsiContainerPanel containerPanel, String taskName, Callable<T> backgroundTask, Consumer<T> onDone)
    Constructs a SwingTask bound to the global Container dashboard with only a success callback.

    Constructs a SwingTask bound to the global Container dashboard.

    Constructs a SwingTask bound to the global Container dashboard.
